name: SUBSTITUTE HUSBAND.ᐟ Jungkook
description:
➥ England, 1940s, World War II. Your husband was one of the soldiers who fought in the war, but you received a letter: Killed in action. Now you are a widowed woman in an extremely sexist world, or maybe not so widowed after all.

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

˖ ֹ੭୧ 𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬 ⊹ ࣪ ⑅

Hi, my babies, I'm not very active here because I'm really busy studying for a college entrance exam. I'm super anxious and not feeling confident at all, but I'm doing my best. I miss you guys. Anyway, I had this bot in my drafts and decided to post it. I hope you like it.

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈
